titleStmt.title: SII 26.234: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 234. (A.R. No. 222 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAMĀDĒVI, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the Kulaśēkharasvāmin temple.

This inscription records a gift of land by a certain Kāḷi Aṟaiyan Irunedikkiḻavan, a maṉṟāḍi of Śōḻaṉmādēvinallūr in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu, for offerings to the god Kulaiśēkhara-Īśvaramuḍaiyār of the same village, at the service of tiruttāṉakkūṭṭi. Mention is made of a piece of land among those forming the boundaries of the gift-land stated to be the śrīdhana land of the donor's elder sister (tamakkai).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 Eḻaāvatu karaivaḻināṭṭuc coḻaṉmātevinallūr maṉṟāṭi kāḷi
Aṟaiyanāṉa Irunetikkiḻavaneṉ Ivvūr Āḷuṭaiyār kulaicekaraīśvaramuṭaiyāṟku tiruttāṉa kūṭṭiyapaṭi
ttaṉmattukku viṭṭa nilamāvatu meṭṭuppākkālil leṉ maṉṟāṭṭukkāṇi nocciyoṭu vitai
tūṇippatakkilit taṉmattukku viṭṭanilam patakkukku nāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyar nilattu
(tu)kku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyar nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai peruṅkavarukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟke
llai Eṉtamakkaikkuc ciritaṉam vāttanilam patakkukkut teṟkum Innāṉkellaikkuḷ paṭṭanilam patakku
kkum Ittaṉmañ cantriraātittavaṟ celvatākak kalveṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Iru netikkiḻavaneṉ Itupanmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.234 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
